Deja Insight release notes

v1.0.3091
  • Added OS X 32-bit and 64-bit versions of DejaLib.
  • Added Linux 32-bit and 64-bit versions of DejaLib.
  • Fixed crash bug when displaying very large sessions ( >50GB ).
  • Fixed Temporary folder setting in options to work for the root of a drive, for example "D:\".
  • Changed the main menu layout.
  • Improved empty sub menu handling.

v1.0.3058
  • The DEJA_SET_REALLOC command has been retired. It was originally included to provide a complete set of hooks for the C style heap functions. However, the DejaLib does not currently execute any realloc operations. Furthermore, it is unlikely that it will do so in future versions. A null DEJA_SET_REALLOC macro is included in order to provide backwards compatibility with existing Deja instrumented code.
  • If no command line is available on the PS3, Insight will use "(PS3App)" for the default application name.
  • The DejaLib was not properly reporting the source file/line of allocations made during calls to DEJA_SET_PARAMETER.
  • Documentation updated.
  • Fixed bad session state tracking when Launcher forced Deja Insight to close.
  • The heap list shows a summary of what is selected in the status bar.
  • Added support for custom channel colors in the Trace Log. Set via the new color column in the Trace Channels view.
  • Added scroll wheel lines support in list views for improved mouse wheel scrolling.
  • Increased copy limit in views to 200,000 rows.
  • Fixed double Endian swap on 32 bit values formatted with %p or %P.
  • Fixed thread leak within Launcher, caused by certain types of Insight disconnects.
  • Increased PS3 network setup timeout to 30 seconds at customer request.
  • Fixed a crash when a tracked memory block is freed more than once.
  • Improved stability of navigation in the Heap List view.
  • Changed "Goto Source in Visual Studio" to bring Visual Studio to the front.
  • Fixed the output of 64-bit object addresses in trace statements.
  • Fixed an Endian bug in the Object Posting system.
  • Added command line option support to DEJA_WII_READY.
  • Added 32 byte alignment to Wii socket receive buffers.

v1.0.2978
  • Altered the various DejaDescriptor macros (DEJA_TYPE, DEJA_BASE, DEJA_FIELD, and so on) to generate a compile time error if DEJA_TYPE is not the first Deja macro within the function (as required per the documentation).
  • If no command line is available on Win32 or Xbox 360, Insight will use "(Win32App)" or "(360App)" for the default application name.
  • If the parameter used for DEJA_OBJECT_INIT is "*this", then Insight will use "<type> @ <addr>" as the default object name.
  • Added new trace logging commands DEJA_TRACE_OFF, DEJA_WARNING_OFF, DEJA_ERROR_OFF, and DEJA_BOOKMARK_OFF which are "off (disabled) by default". Otherwise, the "off by default" trace logging commands function exactly the same as the standard versions (which are "on by default").
  • Added right-click context menu to Context List view.
  • Added Export Heap List... option.
  • The documentation indicates that a DEJA_TYPE statement is required within DejaDescriptor functions. None-the-less, Insight has been updated accept completely empty DejaDescriptor functions.
  • During registration, both script traces and script contexts will now force their channel string to be transmitted. Some users were constructing their script trace/context channel names in buffers on the stack. These strings are cached by address in the DejaLib. If two different strings were constructed in the same buffer at the same address, the DejaLib string cache could sometimes mistakenly conclude that the new string was actually already cached. Thus, unexpected strings were sometimes displayed for script traces and script contexts in Insight.
  • Linux support is now available for beta testing. Please contact support@DejaTools.com if you would like to participate in the Linux beta program.
  • Previously, sizeof(deja_script_context_reg) was 0. This could cause problems with memory managers which do not return distinct addresses for 0 byte allocations. Added a single integer field to give this structure a non-zero size.
  • Insight will no longer take focus when launched minimized.
  • Fixed Wii DejaLib crash by aligning the socket read buffers to 32 bytes for DMA.
  • Added VERBOSE command line option to DejaLib for diagnosing connection problems. Added a variety of messages attached to the verbose flag.
  • Fixed rare Deja Launcher crash when switching pages.

v1.0.2727
  • Fixed timing problem with the background flush thread. This provides automatic non-blocking data flushes designed to prevent sparsely logged data from sitting in the buffers for too long.
  • Deja Insight for Wii is now available for beta testing.
  • Added DEJA_WII_READY function for Wii platform initialization.
  • All DejaLib internal error messages (available via function DEJA_LAST_ERROR or variable DejaLastError) are now displayed in each platform's respective debugger TTY/Output window.
  • Improved focus tracking in the context tree view when opening and closing items.
  • Fixed crash when searching in an empty types view.
  • Fixed accidental undocking of windows when clicking and dragging just to the side of the splitter bars (on the orange window frame highlight).
  • Fixed support for wide file names in deja_script_context_reg.
  • Improved Xbox 360 threading so DejaLib will still function if it fails to create threads.
  • Reduced stack sizes for DejaLib threads on Xbox 360 so DejaLib now uses a combined total of 64K of stack space for threads.
  • Fixed rare problem where the Object Log sometimes wouldn't update when filtering using the checkboxes in the type list.
  • Fixed possible crash bug when Deja Launcher runs on a system for the first time.
  • Improved the PS3 network startup code. It now tests if the network modules are loaded and doesn't try to reload and reinitialize them. This means the game can load them first and DejaLib will still work.
  • Added DEJALIB tags to the PS3 TTY output for DejaLib errors.

v1.0.2395
  • Added a Network panel with Proxy server settings to the Deja Launcher Options dialog.
  • Altered the DEJA_TRACE group of macros such that, if either the channel or format string parameter is "a preprocessor macro which evaluates to a literal string", it will be considered "a literal string".

v1.0.2350
  • Added Playstation 3 support.
  • Threaded the Heap Graph view so that Insight stays more responsive when under heavy load in the heap tracking system.
  • Added support for trace logging and context via embedded scripting systems.
  • Altered DEJA_TRACE family of macros to avoid generating compile error C2603 under Developer Studio.
  • Added Script-to-Trace and Script-to-Context demonstration projects which show techniques for connecting embedded scripting environments to Insight's trace logging and context systems.
  • Added a Heap List view that will show the allocated blocks in the heap for any point in time or for any range of time selected. This view can be sorted by any column so it's easy to find the large allocations in the heap, etc.
  • Launcher can now be started when drive space is low (so the temporary file path can be changed if required). It will however refuse to actually launch Insight to capture data until there is enough free space.
  • Fixed a problem with the heap tracking that would occasionally make the heap graph fail to report all allocated blocks.
  • Added data exporters for 'Trace Log', 'Heap Log', 'Object Log', and 'Frame Log' with various export formats.
  • Improved process load speed of Deja Insight and Deja Launcher. It's really quick now.
  • Fixed a connection bug that caused the application to occasionally fail to connect to Insight.

v1.0.2276
  • Fixed an incorrect operation code display in the heap log view. It would display "free" sometimes instead of "realloc (free)".
  • If a non-blocking flush occurs before the DejaLib has connected, convert it to a blocking flush and force a connection attempt. Previously, if the client application had not yet connected, it woud not make an attempt to connect even when the client application explicitly used a non-blocking flush. Furthermore, if the client application was minimally instrumented and produced sufficiently little Deja output that it never attempted to connect, then all data could be discarded even with a non-blocking flush present in the code.
  • Fixed crash caused by too many live objects posting data. There is now an error trace generated when the internal limits are exceeded. This is usually due to objects leaking in the client application.
  • Modified Heap Graph view when in ranged modes. In now shows only the allocations that were made within the range and not released before the end on the range. This is very useful for visually detecting leaks.
  • Added custom command line option processing to DejaLib. When launching your application you can specify arguments to DejaLib by enclosing them in a { } block. Space separated Variable=Value pairs are parsed out of the option block and multiple option blocks can appear on the command line. Single quotes can be used to enclose the Value if it contains spaces. For example:
    • Demo.exe "{name='Demo Name Replacement'}" - Use the replacement name instead of Arg0 for the application name.
    • Demo.exe "{ip=192.168.0.100}" - Don't broadcast to find Insight, just connect directly to 192.168.0.100.
    • Demo.exe "{name=NewName ip=192.168.0.100}" - A combination.
    • Demo.exe {name=NewName} {ip=192.168.0.100} - 2 option blocks, later ones override earlier if they contain the same variables.
  • Fixed the quantum anomaly in the Object Watch window where you could see future values while tracking live time.
  • Modified DejaPrivate.h to eliminate compile warnings when building at highest warning levels with DEJA_DISABLED set.
  • Terminate the Deja Flush thread if we fail to connect to Insight.
  • Fixed a crash bug caused by a DEJA_LOG_REALLOC with a NULL pointer.

v1.0.2253
  • Modified the TurfWar demo to include hitches or bad frames. TurfWar now serves as a tutorial in the use of context to profile and diagnose performance hitches.
  • Fixed a potential deadlock in the process shutdown phase in DejaDLL. If the application doesn't log enough before process shutdown to cause the threads to spinup then it may deadlock trying to start the threads during process shutdown.
  • Fixed crash bug in the Context List view.

v1.0.2238
  • Fixed pressing Escape in dialog text fields to exit the dialog.
  • Added a Load Session file menu option and a Load Session button to the Sessions panel in Deja Launcher for loading previously saved sessions.
  • The saved session data format has changed and is incompatible with previously saved sessions.
  • Fixed Windows Server 2003 compatibility related crash in Deja Launcher.
  • Fixed double click in Deja Launcher session window to load saved sessions.
  • Added "Check for Updates" menu option to both Deja Insight and Deja Launcher.
  • Fixed erroneous E3004 error message generation reporting heap collisions.
  • In general, DejaDescriptor functions should not invoke (directly or indirectly) other Deja functions. A situation was found where a DejaDescriptor function was indirectly calling DEJA_TRACE. Under certain conditions, this was causing the DejaLib to generate malformed data which in turn caused Insight to crash. This has been fixed.
  • Maintain Channel and Type filter settings when loading saved sessions.
  • Changed tree views to maintain their selections when nodes are expanded and collapsed where possible.

v1.0.2152
  • Added "Add IPs" and "Add Applications" buttons to the Deja Launcher activity log panel. The buttons will be enabled when you select one or more log entries that have an IP or Application name not in your filter lists. Clicking the button adds all selected IPs or Application Names to the appropriate filter lists. Duplicates will not be added.
  • Fixed double clicking in the Launcher session list to load old sessions when there is a space in the Temporary folder path.
  • Fixed a minor memory leak in the Launcher related to the log view.
  • Added support for setting the hardware thread on which the Deja threads execute through the use of DEJA_SET_PARAMETER( DEJA_XBOX360_THREAD_PROCESSOR, n ).
  • Fixed an error in the Heap API mismatch error detection logic that resulted in false positives.
  • Fixed potential crash bug when executing a "Goto Item" in an empty list view.
  • Added code to restore the Notification Icon for Launcher if explorer.exe is restarted.

v1.0.2090 Beta
  • The "Log only known IP's" state is now saved between runs of Deja Launcher.
  • Added an "Enabled" column to the bookmarks window. Bookmarks are enabled by default. When disabled the bookmarks are skipped by F2, shift-F2 operations and they are not considered in the "surrounding bookmarks" time range mode. This lets you quickly disable bookmarks that are interfering with your profile ranges without deleting them.
  • Fixed a minor repaint bug where bookmarks toggled with ctrl-F2 were not immediately shown in the object watch window.
  • Fixed display of context menu from launcher tray icon when the taskbar is not at the bottom of the screen.
  • Improved Deja Flush thread performance. The thread used to wake up every 10ms, it now only wakes every 500ms.
  • Color coding in the heap graph now shows all blocks allocated within the selected time range in red, if there is no range then the last 1% of blocks allocated are shown as red.
  • Added new error messages to better explain DejaLib instrumentation problems in the object tracking system.
  • Added right click menu to the Deja Launcher tray icon.
  • The END key in log views will now attach the view back to time so the view will scroll with new data.

v1.0.1995 Beta
  • Revised the unhandled exception handler to more reliably create Minidump files when an exception occurs in other threads.
  • Added Shift+Delete, Ctrl+Insert, Shift+Insert keys for Cut, Copy, Paste in edit controls.
  • Fixed crash when trying to paste in an edit control with an empty clipboard.
  • Using DEJA_SET_AUTO_FLUSH now generates a warning message in the trace log.
  • Added basic free block information to the heap graph view when the mouse cursor hovers over an area with no allocations.
  • Added column showing total bytes posted to the Types view.
  • Find next / prev warning in the channel tree now finds warnings and errors.
  • Find next / prev warning in the heap log now finds warnings and errors.
  • The heap log now shows mismatched Heap API calls in red, for example a malloc followed by a delete. These errors are also tracked in the trace log.
  • Changed the close button on Deja Launcher to close the application with an are you sure prompt.
  • Changed Escape in Deja Launcher to warn that it will minimize the window to the tray.
  • Changed Minimize in Deja Launcher to warn that it will minimize the window to the tray.
  • Added persistence of the type view visible checkboxes across sessions.

v1.0.1945 Beta
  • Added a 'Show All Channels' option to the trace channels context menu.
  • Added a 'Goto Type' option to the object log context menu.
  • Added a 'Show All Types' option to the types view context menu.
  • Removed Debug versions of the deja libraries from the distribution and renamed the libraries to 'DejaLib.Win32.lib', 'DejaDLL.Win32.dll', and 'DejaLib.X360.lib'.
  • The type view can now be used to filter the object log using the 'visible' checkboxes.

v1.0.1909 Beta
  • Added a types view with cross referencing to the objects window and statistics for the total instances and posts for each object type.
  • Fixed selection logic in some windows for reversed selections.
  • Fixed goto next and previous cross reference in the object log view.
  • Added Visual Studio style ctrl+Tab processing with a window stack. ctrl+Tab cycles backwards and ctrl+shift+Tab cycles forwards through the stack. This works well to set focus back after it is changed by a double click in the object log or heap log/graph windows.
  • Double clicking in the heap log activates or creates a heap graph window and zoom into that block.
  • Double clicking a block in the heap graph activates or creates a heap log window and goes to the log entry for that block.
  • Double clicking in the object log activates or creates an object watch window and adds that object to the watch list.
  • Added keys * and / and shift or ctrl-Click to recursively open or close tree nodes.
  • Fixed saving channel tree state expanded states when right / left keys are used to open and close tree nodes.
  • Fixed problem of sometimes creating new windows off screen when monitor configuration is changed.
  • Fixed column separator double click auto sizing to include the last visible line.

v1.0.1864 Beta
  • Fixed rare Insight crash when viewing VLA's in an Object Watch view.
  • Added DEJA_SET_VALUE( Name, Value ) macro to give the application control over certain Deja Insight parameters. The first supported variables are:
    • Frame.Warn.fps
    • Frame.Warn.ms
    • Frame.Error.fps
    • Frame.Error.ms
    For example to set the warning indicator at 30fps and the error at 20fps in the frame view:
    • DEJA_SET_VALUE( "Frame.Warn.fps" , 30 );
    • DEJA_SET_VALUE( "Frame.Error.fps", 20 );
  • The trace log view now more accurately tracks focus between repeated filtering operations. It now seeks to a time index rather than a list item number.
  • Fixed crash in Launcher when the session status hasn't updated to closed yet but that Insight is closed and the session is double clicked in an attempt to open the Insight.
  • Added Enabled columns to IP and App filter tabs in Deja Launcher to quickly disable or enable entries without deleting and recreating them.

v1.0.1813 Alpha
  • Fixed F10 and shift-F10 navigation to next and previous active allocation in heap log.
  • Added support to allow DEJA_OBJECT_INIT and DEJA_POST to accept arrays of objects.
  • Added DEJA_IF_PTR and DEJA_CSTRING for use within DejaDescriptor functions.
  • DEJA_IF_PTR will post the content of the given pointer if it is non-null. Note that it will only post a single instance of the target type. To post multiple instances of the target type (thus a variable length array), use DEJA_VLARRAY.
  • DEJA_CSTRING will post a standard, NULL-terminated C string.
  • DEJA_VLARRAY will now show the address specified by the given pointer even if the specified count is zero.
  • Variable length string fields (described via either DEJA_CSTRING or DEJA_VLARRAY) will show the string when "closed" in an Object Watch window, and the address and element range when "open".
  • When an object having VLA fields is added to an Object Watch window, Insight will automatically set the count based on the largest size of the VLA within 10 posts of the current time index. Similarly, when you double click on a VLA field type in an Object Watch, the Count field is prepopulated with the VLA maximum size within 10 post of the current time index.
  • Fixed pinning Launcher to start menu, it is now able to find Insight correctly.
  • Restructured the data posting system (DEJA_POST) in the process of adding support for variable length arrays within objects (via DEJA_VLARRAY).
  • The DEJA_FIELD command now understands static sized arrays directly. The DEJA_ARRAY command is aliased to DEJA_FIELD for now, but will be retired in future releases.
  • Previous post functionality:
    • DEJA_FIELD( Object.m_Array ); // output = address of the array
    • DEJA_ARRAY( Object.m_Array ); // output = contents of entire array
  • New post functionality:
    • DEJA_FIELD( Object.m_Array ); // output = contents of entire array
  • Fixed browse for layout in the Insight options dialog.
  • Added a new cell highlight to show which cell in causing a cross reference highlight on a row.
  • Added Object and Context cross referencing to the heap log.
  • Improved coherency of window layouts between Insight sessions controlled by Launcher.
  • Hooked up Next/Prev Warning/Error navigation in the frame log. This makes it very easy to find bad frames.
  • Modified the way setting the start and end points for custom time ranges works to be more intuitive.

v1.0.1748 Alpha
  • Added new buffering scheme for heap free operations. These are costly to write into the database, with each free potentially causing a disk seek. The new buffer helps smooth out the hit from a large number of free operations in a short space of time, like a game level unload.
  • Insight now creates Object Log and Object Watch views as necessary to satisfy the user Goto Object and Add Object to Watch requests.
  • Added 'Goto Object' and 'Add Object to Watch' options to the heap log context menu.
  • Added Object and Context cross references to the heap log.
  • Added 'Add Object to Watch' option to the object log context menu.
  • Added 'Add Object to Watch' option to the trace log context menu.
  • Save configuration when the 'Yield' button is toggled by the user. This improves the coherency of settings between Insight sessions created by Launcher.
  • Modified Deja Launcher "Concurrent Insight" limit to not shut down active sessions, that is Deja Insight instances that are still connected to their client applications. This makes the limit more of a target that can be exceeded if you have a lot of active processes. As the client applications close the corresponding Insight will close if the active number is above the limit.
  • Added a new "custom" range mode to the time bar. The start and end times can be set manually.
  • Insight no longer adds session filenames loaded by double clicking on them in Launcher to the recent files list. This avoids all the GUIDs in the recent file list.

v1.0.1710 Alpha
  • Changed Insight to save the Channel view state whenever the state is changed by a user interface operation.
  • Contexts from the Trace, Heap, and Object Logs now only cross reference to the specific instance of the context within the Context Tree. Previously cross referenced to all instances in the tree.
  • Heap tracking version 2. A rewrite of the heap tracking system in Insight to improve performance and storage efficiency.

v1.0.1686 Alpha
  • Fixed XBox360 compatibility with DejaLauncher and added an additional error message to the log to help diagnose connection problems.
  • There was an execution path during the rendering of the Context List which did not properly lock shared data for access. If the timing was just right (that is, seemingly at random), the data could be read during the middle of a larger atomic update which was resulting in an access violation (null pointer).

v0.9.1665 Alpha
  • Trace Log view modified to include the full context tree in the context column.
  • Added a basic "frames" view that shows information about each frame including duration and heap activity.
  • Improved the sessions tab in Deja Launcher. There are now fields to show the status of the session "Active, Open, Closed" and related color coding. There is also a new column to shown which platform the application connected from.
  • Added a watchdog event to Deja Launcher to verify the status of any child Deja Insight processes. This catches the case where Insight has either crashed or been killed by task manager, etc.
  • Resolved problem with creating new temporary folders that already exist, also now tests to make sure it is a folder and not a file.
  • Fixed a Deja Launcher crash that can occur after running for a long period of time.
  • Fixed a Deja Launcher deadlock that can occur when managing large numbers of processes.
  • Fixed the window title in Deja Insight so that it displays the name of the connected application or the filename of a loaded session.

v0.9.1603 Alpha
  • Added support for projects where wchar_t is not a built-in type. (For example: Developer Studio 2003 projects using default compiler settings.)
  • Extended the formatted output specifications. %hs indicates a narrow string argument, and %ls indicates a wide string argument. The interpretation of %hs and %ls is not affected by the width of the format string (unlike %s and %S).
  • Launcher now processes a double click in the session list to show the Insight instance associated with that session or to launch a new Insight with the old session loaded.

v0.9.1589 Alpha
  • Improved the Export Active Heap feature. The process should be substantially faster. New data fields have been added: context, scoped object, heap function, and source.
  • Added a spinner control to the launcher sessions tab to control the number of old sessions kept in the temporary folder.
  • Context Tree view will remember the open/closed state of each node in the tree.
  • When Insight is launched in stealth mode it will now automatically exit when the client application disconnects.
  • Added a free drive space check and warning dialog to Launcher when it runs.
  • Added free drive space check to Launcher to prevent launching Insight and flag an error message in the activity log if free space is too low.
  • Added free drive space check to Insight on startup in standalone mode. It will display an error dialog and close if free space is too low.
  • Added an Insight launch mode control to Deja Launcher. Insight can be set to launch in Stealth, Minimized, Normal or Maximized modes of operation.
  • Fixed crash when no bookmarks were set and the Bookmark Time Range mode was engaged.
  • When in frame time range mode and watching live time, the last COMPLETE frame will be used as the time range. This improves the "experience quality" when watching the Context List view in Live Time with Frame Time Range selected.
  • Added cross references based on context to Context List, Context Tree, Heap Log, and Trace Log.
  • Added a "Log only known IP's" checkbox to the Launcher activity log. This will only log traffic from the IP's in your IP filter list when enabled, it logs all traffic when disabled.
  • Channel Visibile and Enabled states are now linked to the client application name and the last 2000 states are retained, not just the states from the last session captured.
  • All strings (channels, labels, format strings, %s arguments) are now clipped to a maximum of 1024 characters (either narrow or wide).
  • Fixed Arg0 processing in DejaLib when there are spaces in the path.

v0.9.1554 Alpha
  • The functionality of the Timebar sync buttons in the heap log and object log has changed to allow cursor navigation within the views without altering the state of the views.
  • The Time Bar now takes keyboard focus when clicked with the mouse. This allows for time accurate bookmark setting and navigation with F2 keys.

v0.9.1526 Alpha
  • Changed ctrl-F in the heap log view to a text find dialog.
  • Removed the IP Filter checkbox from the launcher, it always filters now.
  • New buttons on tool bar to set range modes. Available modes are "Start to Cursor" (normal operation), "Surround Bookmarks", and "Surrounding Frame". The range mode currently only affects the two context views.
  • Fixed crash when loading a saved session failed.
  • Fixed state of channel visibility checkboxes when loading a saved session.

v0.9.1510 Alpha
  • Removed case sensitivity on command line options.
  • Stopped duplicate entry of objects into watch window when double clicking in the object log.
  • Fixed Channel enabled and visible state Save / Load.
  • Removed templates from the object system interface.
  • Fixed a major slowdown in the heap tracking system.
  • Added class as an argument to DEJA_BASE (within a DejaDescriptor). This fixes support for multiple inheritance by allowing multiple DEJA_BASE statements in a Descriptor.
  • Reversed the order of parameters to DEJA_TYPE and DEJA_ENUM (within a DejaDescriptor) to improve code readability.
  • Added support for wide file names to the heap functions.
  • DEJA_SET_AUTO_FLUSH now only accepts a bool value.
  • Default parameter to DEJA_FLUSH is now true.
  • Retired DEJA_STRING. Use DEJA_ARRAY for fixed length character arrays.
  • In the Object Watch view, the labels <create> and <destroy> have been changed to <INIT> and <KILL> to correspond better with DEJA_OBJECT_INIT and DEJA_OBJECT_KILL.
  • Added a "Disconnect" button to the toolbar that closes the connection between Insight and the user application. The button also reflects the connection status.
  • In the context List, contexts with all hits in the "future" are now colored "future blue".
  • Added a new Goto command bound to ctrl-G in log views for direct access by item number.
  • Modified Trace Log view to keep the current focus item (or the remaining closest item) centered after filtering.
  • Fixed memory leak when searching in log views with no entries.
  • Added column sort information to saved layout.
  • Context List sort defaults to Global %.

v0.9.1380 Alpha
  • Trace Channels View: Added context menu commands "Hide Selected Channels", "Show Selected Channels" and "Show Only Selected Channels".
  • Trace Log View: Changed the "Hide Channels" context command to "Hide Selected Channels" and fixed the functionality to hide all selected instead of just the focus item.
  • Added "current time active context" highlight to Context List.
  • Changed the Trace Log "Hide channel" context menu option to "Hide Selected Channels".
  • Added double click support to Context List.
  • Added support for sorting columns to Context List.
  • Added a Bookmarks view for managing bookmarks. The view displays the time, source view and an editable comment for each bookmark.
  • Alphabetically order siblings in the Context Tree.
  • Highlight the current conext (for each thread) in the Context Tree.
  • Color "future" data blue in the Context Tree.
  • As nodes were added to the Context Tree, the "focus" item would not always "follow" its data. Fixed. Also, if the focus was visible before data is added, then the tree list will automatically scroll to keep the focus in view.
  • Added more context menu options (find, next cross reference, next same context) to the Context Tree pane.
  • Dialogs now remember their position instead of defaulting to the center of their parent window. This position is also saved with the window layout.
  • Restore focus to the correct panel when switching away then back to Deja Insight with mouse or Alt-TAB.
  • Modified list views to center items when the user goes to an item that is off screen through a menu command or accelerator. For example using the function keys or find dialog.

v0.9.1303 Alpha
  • Fixed shutdown of DejaLib in the situation where the threads have been terminated without notification.
  • Insight displays an error if a non-literal string is used in DEJA_CONTEXT.

v0.9.1287 Alpha
  • Fixed problem of skipping adjecent bookmarks in logs.
  • Added F2 and shift-F2 handling for next and previous bookmark to all windows.

v0.9.1283 Alpha
  • Added support for displaying type long and 64 bit integers via DEJA_TRACE. "%d"=int, "%ld"=long, and "%lld"="long long" or int64.
  • New Drag and Drop interface for adding objects to watch windows.
  • Copy columns selection wasn't working correctly when columns were reordered.
  • Changed list copy behavior. ctrl+C copies the visible columns, shift+ctrl+C copies the selected columns.
  • Added drag and drop from object list to object watch window.
  • DejaLib could not find Insight on the same machine when there were no network connections. Fixed.
  • Reworked the atomic type DejaDescriptor declarations. This allows fields of type "long" and "long long" to work now.
  • Added more support for formatted output specifications. All valid format specifications should now be accepted. Note that the flags, width, and precision specifications are parsed but not used when generating output at this time.
  • Escape now clears the selection in the object watch window.

v0.9.1259 Alpha
  • Insight was crashing when trying to report E4000 (object collision from DEJA_OBJECT_INIT). It was trying to get the name of the "new" object before it had been registered with the system. Fix: If there is a collision, set a flag and save the name of the old object, then proceed with the new object, and finally report the error.
  • Added new context menu option to the trace log view to hide this channel.
  • Changed object watch column size algorithm to use the target as a minimum.
  • Fixed object watch display of u64 and s64 types.

v0.9.1252 Alpha
  • Added classic windows theme compatibility.
  • Added a goto object option in the trace log view context menu.

v0.9.1250 Alpha
  • Added Context menu with Goto Source to context list and tree views.
  • Removed "gray" bitmaps for channels with errors and warnings.
  • Added "Child Logs" subtotals to channel tree view.
  • Fixed "right to expand node" in channel tree view.
  • Added "Copy Selected Columns" to log views.
